normal_prompts.prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts management, deals pipeline, and role-based access for admins and sales reps
Create an e-commerce store with product listings, shopping cart, checkout with Stripe payments, and order history
Build a project management tool with boards, tasks, team members, due dates, and progress tracking
Create a blog platform where writers can publish posts, readers can comment and like, and admins can moderate
Build a restaurant booking system where customers can reserve tables and restaurants can manage availability
Create a learning management system with courses, lessons, quizzes, and student progress tracking for instructors

edge_case_prompts.notes: Extremely vague — system should document assumptions heavily

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build a free app where all features are free but users must pay for everything

edge_case_prompts.notes: Minimal info — system should infer CRUD and basic auth
Single word — should expand into reasonable CRM design

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build an app where admins cannot see user data but must approve all user actions
edge_case_prompts.notes: Logically contradictory — can't approve what you can't see

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build a public dashboard showing live weather and stock prices with no login needed
edge_case_prompts.notes: Legitimate case with no authentication required
